approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies hedge accounting for recognised items, and a recognised intragroup foreign-currency receivable raises the recognised-item hedge model at consolidated level.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 also treats forecast transactions, including certain intragroup foreign-currency exposures in consolidation, within the hedge-accounting framework, making the cash flow hedge model a peer top-level approach.
